era: Hip-Hop. E=6 -- identity as force, Central District roots, queer Black woman MC. E=6 STREAK FINALE (161-168). Thirty-fifth and final degree in hip-hop era (134-168). v1.49.308.

location.formative: Central District -- historically Seattle's Black neighborhood. Jazz to hip-hop continuum. Gentrification context. Cultural continuity.

members.note: Central District, Seattle. Queer Black woman MC. Fierce lyricism. Unapologetic identity. Community presence.

theory_nodes.concept: Identity as E=6 force -- identity integrated into art as maximum-energy force. Queer, Black, woman, MC -- each axis amplifies the others. The personal is political. Presence as statement.
examples: Queer Black woman MC in male-dominated, heteronormative scene.
Identity not separate from art -- integrated into lyrics and performance.
Presence at the microphone as act of force.
E=6 through identity rather than volume or aggression.
theory_nodes.description: Identity as force. E=6 through being. Presence as power.

genealogy.relationship: Gifted Gab at 168. Identity as maximum force.

theory_nodes.concept: E=6 streak complete (161-168) -- eight degrees at maximum energy demonstrating scene depth and modal diversity. Eight modes: collective, emotional, street, aggressive, lyrical, hunger, joyful, identity.
examples: Gifted Gab (168): identity as force. FINALE.
theory_nodes.description: E=6 streak complete. Eight degrees. Eight modes. Scene depth proven.

theory_nodes.concept: Central District hip-hop -- Seattle's historic Black neighborhood as hip-hop origin. Jazz to hip-hop continuum. Gentrification context. Cultural continuity through music.
examples: Historic center of Seattle's Black community.
Jazz clubs of 1940s-60s to hip-hop of 2000s+.
Cultural continuity through artists like Gifted Gab.
theory_nodes.description: Central District. Seattle's Black neighborhood. Cultural continuity.

cross_references.relationship: NEIGHBORHOOD CONTEXT! Capitol Hill (167) to Central District (168). Two neighborhoods. Two types of cultural persistence.
QUEER VOICES! THEESatisfaction: queer experimental, Sub Pop. Gifted Gab: queer MC, Sportn Life. Queer identity across 22 degrees.
STREAK ARC! Collective force opens streak (161). Identity as force closes it (168). Group to individual. Eight E=6 modes.
REPRESENTATION! Blue Scholars: Filipino-American. Gifted Gab: queer Black woman. Both E=6. Both expanding representation.
